summary: Independent read-only QA accepts the M6 exit validation recommendation at review commit 3210cddc. docs/GATE-M6.md records the Roadmap and acceptance-matrix evidence chain for M6 Alpha system-complete exit, distinguishes PASS_WITH_LIMITS from plain PASS and BLOCKED, preserves DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE, does not fabricate reviewer acceptance, does not hide M4/M5 or process limits, and does not start M7 content lock or any forbidden telemetry/server/multiplayer/arbitrary-code mod/release/commercial/branding/frozen-architecture scope. No accepted P0/P1 blocker or forbidden diff path was found.

tests_run.result: Current HEAD was 3e4314135f5bf65f67ef78c1c2482ca5caea0635, a later route/process commit after the review target.
Confirmed review target 3210cddc follows cd5cebeb base; current HEAD 3e431413 is route-only process metadata after 3210cddc.

Changed paths were PROJECT_STATUS.md, docs/GATE-M6.md, task registry/state/model-routing/goal-mode files, and project/messages route/outbox files only; no forbidden product, package, content-source, tools, CI, roadmap, acceptance matrix, prior gate, ADR, manifest, or release-artifact path changed.
Later delta contains only QA routing/process state paths: goal-mode-state, model-routing-state, M6 exit task, thread registry, and the systems-to-QA route file.
No whitespace errors in the reviewed target diff.
No whitespace errors before QA handoff creation.

Roadmap M6 section requires diplomacy/legitimacy/succession, layered AI, policy/event/encyclopedia, three-scenario pipeline, map candidate, batch balance, accessibility, start-to-victory playability, no P0/P1 data damage, AI full-game run, and no placeholder major-system UI.
Acceptance matrix M6 row and Roadmap M6 section were found and matched the gate evidence categories.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON validation for M6 exit dependency status, gate phrases, required-test coverage, and diff scope
tests_run.result: All M6 exit dependencies were CLOSED and preserved DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE; docs/GATE-M6.md contained M6_GATE, reviewer-pending language, start-to-victory, no-rescue AI, non-placeholder UI, no accepted P0/P1, limits, manual battle deferral, M7-content-lock exclusion, M4/M5 PASS_WITH_LIMITS context, and forbidden-scope exclusions; target diff paths were all allowed; required tests were recorded in the systems handoff.

tests_run.command: rg -n "manual node battle|manual_node_battle|DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE|M6-.*MANUAL|manual.*M6|battle" project/tasks/active project/messages docs/GATE-M6.md PROJECT_STATUS.md
tests_run.result: Manual battle mentions were exclusions, preserved DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE records, or the prior M5 human-gate decision; no M6/M7/M8 implementation, blocking spike, or blocking research task file was found.

tests_run.command: rg -n "telemetry|server|multiplayer|arbitrary-code|mods|release|commercial|branding|content lock|M7|M8|Human Gate|frozen architecture" docs/GATE-M6.md project/messages/outbox/M6-EXIT-VALIDATION-001__MSG-20260628-M6-EXIT-SYSTEMS-REVIEW__systems_architect.json project/tasks/active/M6-EXIT-VALIDATION-001.json PROJECT_STATUS.md
tests_run.result: Matches are prohibitions, explicit limits, or historical gate notes; no authorization for telemetry, server/multiplayer, arbitrary-code mods, release/commercial/branding, M7 content lock, or frozen architecture changes was found.
Early REQUEST_CHANGES fields are preserved, but each affected task has later systems_status_r2/r3 ACCEPT and lead ACCEPT/closure evidence; the gate did not rely on a fabricated acceptance.

decisions: ACCEPT: docs/GATE-M6.md records the required Roadmap and acceptance-matrix evidence chain for start-to-victory, diplomacy, legitimacy, succession, layered AI, policy/event/encyclopedia, three-scenario pipeline, map candidate, batch balance, accessibility, adviser evidence, and no accepted P0/P1.
ACCEPT: M6 exit evidence supports at least one deterministic Alpha start-to-victory path, AI full-game completion without rescue hooks, and non-placeholder major-system client surfaces.

ACCEPT: M6_GATE = PASS_WITH_LIMITS is appropriate because evidence is Alpha/local-bounded and the document explicitly distinguishes it from PASS and BLOCKED without claiming reviewer acceptance before this QA review.
ACCEPT: DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE remains intact; no manual node battle implementation task or M6/M7/M8 blocking spike/research was created.

ACCEPT: target diff is limited to allowed gate/process/message/state paths and does not touch apps/packages/content-source/tools/.github/roadmap/acceptance matrix/prior gates/ADR/manifests/release artifacts.
ACCEPT: required command evidence is recorded and cross-checked; no P0/P1 blocker, severity downgrade, or hidden blocker was found.
ACCEPT: gate grants no authority for telemetry, server/multiplayer, arbitrary-code mods, release/commercial/branding decisions, M7 content lock, or frozen architecture changes.
risks: PASS_WITH_LIMITS remains necessary: three-scenario data is Alpha validation scaffolding, not M7 content lock.
PASS_WITH_LIMITS remains necessary: adviser evidence is local/privacy-safe and not broad external player research.
PASS_WITH_LIMITS remains necessary: batch balance exposes tuning risks but records p0p1CandidateCount = 0.
Prior M4/M5 PASS_WITH_LIMITS and process-limit context remain historical limits and are not erased by this gate.
Desktop package evidence is local smoke packaging, not a signed release candidate.
Current HEAD 3e431413 includes route-only metadata after the requested review commit 3210cddc; QA reviewed the requested commit and confirmed the later delta is allowed process routing.
requested_action: Lead may integrate the accepted M6 exit gate, validate this QA handoff, and decide the next process step without starting M7 content lock from this QA verdict alone.
